message:
Merge PR #1686: feat: add DOT and interactive HTML export to bd graph

Adds --dot flag for Graphviz DOT output and --html flag for self-contained
interactive D3.js visualization. Also adds a new terminal-native DAG view
as the default graph renderer. Includes security fixes for XSS in HTML
template and tooltip rendering.

Co-authored-by: paf0186 <paf0186@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
